loan_code.nulltext: ดูทั้งหมด ไม่ต้องเลือกนะจ๊ะ

root.sql:
select sum(tab.row_memno)over(order by tab.balance_date ,tab.loan_code , tab.member_group_no ,tab.membership_no ,tab.member_name ,tab.seq_no ) as rowno, tab.* from ( SELECT decode(lag(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no,1,null)over( order by sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date ,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_name ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.seq_no) ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no,0,1) as row_memno,
sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.client_id , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.seq_no , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.share_balance , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.share_period , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.share_installment , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_contract , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_loantype , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_balance , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_period , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_installment , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.salary_amount , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ) as grp_con_name, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_intarr , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.intarr_date , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id , sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control.control_desc , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_loan_code , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_status_code , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_name , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_shot , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_long , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_paycode , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_last_date , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code_desc , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal .emer_prin_arr FROM sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type , sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code WHERE ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id = sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control.control_id ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_loan_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code ) and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_balance > 0 and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_loan_code not in ( '0' ) /*WHERE*/ -- and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control = '034200' order by sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date ,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_name ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.seq_no )tab
